mapper.sql: id, exp_type, project_type, project_id, user_id, is_granted
mapper.select: select cfpug.id as rowId, exp_type as expType,'' as expTypeName,cfpug.project_type as projectType,cfpug.project_id as projectId,sfpi.name as projectName, user_id as userId,csu.name as userName, is_granted as isGranted from cf_fund_project_user_grant cfpug left join ct_srm_user csu on cfpug.user_id=csu.id left join srm_fund_project_info sfpi on cfpug.project_id=sfpi.id
